text.title: Django Testing with pytest Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply the testing-django-pytest methodology end-to-end.

step.name: scaffold-conftest
step.action: Write tests/conftest.py with factory_boy factories for every model touched. Define pytest fixtures wrapping the factories.

step.name: emit-tests
step.action: Write tests as def test_* functions; use @pytest.mark.django_db; capture results before asserting; parametrize for variants.

step.name: mock-discipline
step.action: Mock only direct collaborators (HTTP clients, mail backend). Use responses or pytest-httpx for HTTP.

step.name: mutation-on-critical
step.action: Run mutmut on critical modules; gate score in CI for those paths.

step.name: tdd-checkpoint
step.action: Ensure the agent surfaces failing-test diff before any production code edit. Wire a hook that flags prod edits in the same turn as test edits.
